[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 0111110 5
2 1110111 6
3 0101101 4
4 0111111 6
5 0011101 4
6 1100001 3
7 0001111 4

12 21 1100000 2
23 32 1101110 5

56 65 0010111 4
67 76 0111010 4
70 07 0000101 2

13 31 0001110 3
24 42 0110000 2 match 0
